strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with core stack overlap: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Direct AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/secondary (robotics work at Altom, 2016-2018)
No explicit evidence of authentication/authorization or security best-practices work

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java evidence

response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node/React fullstack delivery, testing expertise, cloud/containerization, multi-language proficiency, and AI agent development. The candidate shows concrete evidence on most: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, TDD and CI/CD at RIDE, Kubernetes deployment for GISCollective, and MCP-based AI-agent tooling at re:cinq — a rare direct match for the AI agent requirement. Testing pedigree is exceptional (authored test libraries, taught TDD/Selenium courses), though Vitest/Jest/Playwright are not named. Gaps are Nest.js (absent), current Kotlin/Java usage, and explicit security work. He exceeds the 6+ year bar and holds a CS degree; the framework gaps are learnable given demonstrated polyglot range (D, C++, Swift, Java, PHP).
